name: Observable Plot
when_to_use: 需要对表格数据做分箱、堆叠、分面小倍数或多 mark 分层 EDA 时用它而非手写 SVG,因为原生手写在聚合正确性、分面布局和共享尺度上失败;静态单一柱线饼非做它。
why_valuable: AI 默认做不到正确的分箱聚合、多分面尺度对齐和多 mark 组合,只能仿出单面静态图;Observable Plot 把这些高错率步骤收进 grammar-of-graphics 原语。

data_in.note: rows 是原始表格;marks 必须是 Plot.barY/lineY/dot/rectY/cell 等原生工厂返回的 Plot.Mark 运行时对象,不是字符串或自造 JSON DSL。

schema.rows: Record<string, string | number | boolean | Date | null>[]
schema.marks: Plot.Mark[] —— 每个 mark 工厂直接消费 rows

options?.width?: number —— boot 默认取容器像素宽,量不到时 640
options?.margin?: number —— 默认由 Plot 自动推断
options?.x?: Plot.ScaleOptions —— 默认从 mark 通道推断
options?.y?: Plot.ScaleOptions —— 默认从 mark 通道推断
options?.color?: Plot.ScaleOptions —— 默认从 mark 通道推断

spec.note: Plot.plot 产出 SVG/figure,boot 显式给默认 height 400px并量取容器 width;它没有原地重排 API,容器尺寸变化时应重建节点,铁律 3 禁 vh/百分比高。

example._why: Plot 的数据是 JSON,但 marks 是原生工厂产物;用最小 JS 明确二者边界,避免把 mark 调用误塞成字符串。

minimal.native_js:
const rows = [{category:'A',value:12},{category:'B',value:19}];
const data = { rows, marks: [Plot.barY(rows, {x:'category', y:'value'}), Plot.ruleY([0])] };

empty.native_js:
const rows = [];
const data = { rows, marks: [] };

carriers.widget: supported:返回的 SVG/figure 直接落 shadow 容器,无必需全局 CSS 或上行能力

isolation.evidence: +esm scan: 0 `document.head` refs; Plot generates a scoped class (e.g. `plot-d6a7b5`) and places its `<style>` INSIDE the returned figure element, so styles travel with the node into the shadow root (no head injection). 0 `document.body` -> returns a detached SVG/figure node the consumer mounts. 0 document/window addEventListener -> interactive marks (tip/pointer/crosshair) bind to the returned SVG's own elements. Returned figure with its scoped inline <style> drops straight into a shadow container.

en.when_to_use: Use it when you need binning, stacking, faceted small multiples, or layered multi-mark EDA over tabular data, instead of hand-writing SVG, because native implementations fail at correct aggregation, facet layout, and shared scales. Not for a static single bar/line/pie chart.
en.why_valuable: AI cannot correctly perform bin aggregation, align scales across multiple facets, or compose multiple marks by default; it can only imitate a single static chart. Observable Plot packages these high-error steps as grammar-of-graphics primitives.

data_in.note: rows is the raw table. marks must be runtime Plot.Mark objects returned by native factories such as Plot.barY/lineY/dot/rectY/cell, not strings or a custom JSON DSL.

schema.rows: Record<string, string | number | boolean | Date | null>[]
schema.marks: Plot.Mark[] -- Each mark factory consumes rows directly

options?.width?: number -- boot defaults to container pixel width, or 640 when unavailable
options?.margin?: number -- Inferred automatically by Plot by default
options?.x?: Plot.ScaleOptions -- Inferred from mark channels by default
options?.y?: Plot.ScaleOptions -- Inferred from mark channels by default
options?.color?: Plot.ScaleOptions -- Inferred from mark channels by default

spec.note: Plot.plot produces SVG/figure. boot explicitly sets a default height of 400px and measures container width. It has no in-place reflow API, so rebuild the node when container dimensions change; Rule 3 prohibits vh/percentage height.
